justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a diverse range of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation felt stuck in a loop, with the agent repeatedly stating that the 4 PM slot was unavailable without offering more varied alternatives.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer alternative times beyond the user's initial suggestions, leading to a repetitive and unproductive interaction.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was unable to book an appointment because it repeatedly checked the same time slot (4 PM) across different days, even after multiple rejections, instead of proactively suggesting a broader range of alternative times or days.
